meta.culinary_role_pairing_rule: FRUIT-PAIR-001: wine pairing follows the fruit's culinary role — lemon for acidity, raisin for dried-fruit profile, coconut milk for creamy applications, prune for slow-cooked braises.
meta.fruit001_ownership_rule: FRUIT-001: processing-derived canonical entities retain distinct pairing profiles and must not inherit wine relationships from source crops.
meta.pairing_philosophy: Curated editorial pairing knowledge for fruit — FRUIT-PAIR-001 pairs by culinary role as an ingredient, not botanical origin or sweetness alone.
